narrativeBullets: Case AX-31 (AnXplore, ACOM) - aspect ratio 4.80, size ratio 2.96.
Morphological criteria flag this case as elevated rupture risk.
focusCase.uncertaintySummary: Split-conformal calibration at alpha=0.10: empirical coverage on the held-out cohort = 0.96, abstain rate = 0.49. Heatmap colour encodes mean wall risk; opacity encodes posterior standard deviation (epistemic uncertainty).
focusCase.modalityNote: Reduced-order Womersley pulsatile CFD on real AnXplore mesh + parametric augmentation. Demonstration only - not for clinical use.
